ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate entry */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the candidate */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate (Male/Female) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate applied */,
  "admission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the candidate's application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "total_candidates" INTEGER /* Total number of candidates in this entry */,
  "category_a_b_subjects_male" INTEGER /* Number of male candidates taking at least five Category A/B subjects */,
  "category_a_b_subjects_female" INTEGER /* Number of female candidates taking at least five Category A/B subjects */,
  "category_a_b_subjects_total" INTEGER /* Total number of candidates taking at least five Category A/B subjects */,
  "core_elective_subjects_male" INTEGER /* Number of male candidates taking four core and one elective subject */,
  "core_elective_subjects_female" INTEGER /* Number of female candidates taking four core and one elective subject */,
  "core_elective_subjects_total" INTEGER /* Total number of candidates taking four core and one elective subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_points" (
  "grade_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade point entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate in the candidates table */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year for which the grade point is recorded */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Fall, Spring) for which the grade point is recorded */,
  "grade_point_range" TEXT /* Range of grade points (e.g., 12-14, 15-17) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Exact GPA of the candidate */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the candidate */,
  "number_of_candidates" INTEGER /* Total number of candidates in this grade point range */,
  "percentage_male" REAL /* Percentage of male candidates in this range */,
  "percentage_female" REAL /* Percentage of female candidates in this range */,
  "percentage_total" REAL /* Percentage of total candidates in this range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_points_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_categories" (
  "subject_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject category (e.g., Category A/B subjects) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject category */,
  "required_credits" INTEGER /* Number of required credits for the subject category */,
  "optional_credits" INTEGER /* Number of optional credits for the subject category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Total candidates, Total grade points) */,
  "metric_value_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric value (e.g., numeric, text) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value associated with the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate associated with this metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Active status of the user (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate data accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
